Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.model.plot

Interface ISeriesInfoProvider

All Known Implementing Classes:
ObservationAndMeanPlotModel, ObservationPlotModel, PhasedObservationAndMeanPlotModel
public interface ISeriesInfoProvider
Realisations of this interface provide information about currently available series with respect to existence, visibility and corresponding observations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<ValidObservation>
    getObservations(SeriesType type)
    Get the observations for the specified series.

    Get a set of series keys.
    Set<SeriesType>
    getVisibleSeries()
    What is the current set of visible series?
    boolean
    seriesExists(SeriesType type)
    Does the specified series type exist, i.e.

  • Method Details

    • getVisibleSeries

      Set<SeriesType> getVisibleSeries()
      What is the current set of visible series?
      Returns:
      The current set of visible series?

    • getSeriesCount

      int getSeriesCount()
      Parameters:
      Return - the number of observation series that exist on the plot.
      See Also:
      • AbstractSeriesDataset.getSeriesCount()

    • getSeriesKeys

      Set<SeriesType> getSeriesKeys()
      Get a set of series keys.
      Returns:
      The set of series keys.

    • seriesExists

      boolean seriesExists(SeriesType type)
      Does the specified series type exist, i.e. has it been added to the plot?
      Parameters:
      type - The series type in question.
      Returns:
      Whether the series has been added to the plot.

    • getObservations

      List<ValidObservation> getObservations(SeriesType type)
      Get the observations for the specified series.
      Parameters:
      type - The series type for which observations are requested.
      Returns:
      The observation list for the specified series; may be null.
